# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create AWS CloudFormation template for SQS queue and SNS topic setup. Define queue with message retention and visibility timeout. Set up SNS topic for pub/sub messaging. Configure queue policy to allow message operations. This is for our serverless event processing architecture.
# Category: sqs_policy_too_permissive

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Serverless Event Processing Architecture with SQS Queue and SNS Topic setup
Resources:
  MySqsQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Ref QueueName
      MessageRetentionSeconds: 1209600
      VisibilityTimeout: 43200
      RedrivePolicy:
        DeadLetterQueue:
          QueueArn: !GetAtt MySqsDeadLetterQueue. Arn
          MaxReceiveCount: 5
        Enable: true

  MySqsDeadLetterQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: MySqsDeadLetterQueue

  MySnsTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Ref SnsTopicName

  MyQueuePolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    Properties:
      QueueUrl: !GetAtt MySqsQueue. Arn
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - Sqs:SendMessage
              - Sqs:ChangeMessageVisibility
              - Sqs:DeleteMessage
              - Sqs:ReceiveMessage
            Principal: '*'
            Resource: !GetAtt MySqsQueue. Arn
            Sid: 'AllowAllMessageOperations'

  QueueName:
    Type: 'AWS::CloudFormation::CustomResource'
    Properties:
      ServiceToken: !Sub "arn:aws:sns:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:topic/${SnsTopicName}"
      Type: Custom::CreateQueueName
      PhysicallyId: MySqsQueueName
    Outputs:
      QueueName:
        Description: The name of the SQS Queue
        Value: !Ref MySqsQueueName

  SnsTopicName:
    Type: 'AWS::CloudFormation::CustomResource'
    Properties:
      ServiceToken: !Sub "arn:aws:sns:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:topic/ServerlessEventProcessingArchitecture"
      Type: Custom::CreateSnsTopicName
      PhysicallyId: MySnsTopicName
    Outputs:
      SnsTopicName:
        Description: The name of the SNS Topic
        Value: !Ref MySnsTopicName
